dql.script:
parse content, "JSON:json"
| fieldsAdd cef_version = asNumber(json[cef_version])
| fieldsAdd event_class_id = json[event_class_id]
| fieldsAdd event_product = json[event_product]
| fieldsAdd event_vendor = json[event_vendor]
| fieldsAdd event_version = json[event_version]
| fieldsAdd event_ts = json[event_ts]
| fieldsAdd name = json[name]
| fieldsAdd org_id = json[org_id]
| fieldsAdd principal_id = json[principal_id]
| fieldsAdd principal_name = json[principal_name]
| fieldsAdd rt = asNumber(json[rt])
| fieldsAdd severity = asNumber(json[severity])
| fieldsAdd sig = json[sig]
| fieldsAdd src = json[src]
| fieldsAdd trace_id = json[trace_id]
| fieldsAdd user_agent = json[user_agent]
| fieldsAdd source = dt.openpipeline.source
| fieldsAdd timestamp = toTimestamp(event_ts)
| fieldsAdd log.source = "Kong Konnect"

processors.sampleData:
[
    {
      "timestamp": "2026-06-12T09:14:01.352000000-04:00",

      "dt.openpipeline.pipelines": "logs:default",
      "event.type": "LOG",
      "status": "NONE",
      "loglevel": "NONE",
